betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fluiduct§f

§aTransfer fluids between tanks and machines through a pressurized pipe network with balanced distribution!§f

§bFluiducts§f carry one fluid type per network. They connect to any adjacent fluid container and distribute fluid as evenly as possible. Throughput per connection depends on fluid viscosity (§e80–600 mB/tick§f) and network pressure — a full network runs at max throughput, an empty one at half.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Transparent§f: §e1× Copper Ingot§f + §e1× Glass§f → §e6× Fluiduct§f.
§b• Opaque§f: §e1× Copper Ingot§f + §e1× Lead Ingot§f → §e6× Fluiduct (Opaque)§f.

§6Luminous Fluids§f:
Transparent fluiducts emit light when carrying luminous fluids like lava or §bEnergized Glowstone§f — useful as a fluid-level indicator.

§cWarning§f: Basic fluiducts break with extremely hot or cold fluids (lava, gelid cryotheum). Use §bHardened Fluiducts§f for those.
